query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.cpf, l.name as lider_name 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id 
WHERE l.email = 'relacionamento@ckmtalents.net' AND u.role = 'colaborador'
ORDER BY u.name;
command:

FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id 
WHERE l.email = 'relacionamento@ckmtalents.net' AND u.role = 'colaborador'
ORDER BY u.name;
